$schema: Conditions catalog for AD&D 2E + Player's Option. Durations are typical defaults — DM may override per instance.

conditions.name: Poisoned
conditions.description: Suffering ongoing damage or other effects from poison. Specifics depend on the poison type.

conditions.name: Held
conditions.description: Cannot move, attack, or cast spells. Hold Person — duration 2 rounds + 1/level.

conditions.name: Paralyzed
conditions.description: Completely immobile. Touch attacks against the target gain +4 to hit; melee attacks auto-hit.

conditions.name: Stunned
conditions.description: Cannot attack, defend, or cast. Drops held items. Loses Dex bonus to AC.

conditions.name: Asleep
conditions.description: Helpless. Sleep spell duration 5 rounds/level. Wakes if attacked or shaken.

conditions.name: Charmed
conditions.description: Considers the caster a trusted friend. Will not attack the caster or their allies, but obeys reasonable requests.

conditions.name: Confused
conditions.description: Roll d10 each round: 1 attack caster, 2-6 stand confused, 7-9 attack nearest, 10 act normally.

conditions.name: Feared
conditions.description: Flees from the source of fear at maximum movement. Will not voluntarily approach.

conditions.name: Blind
conditions.description: −4 to attack rolls, −4 to AC, may move only at half speed. Targets gain +4 to hit.

conditions.name: Deafened
conditions.description: Cannot hear. 50% chance to miscast spells with verbal components.

conditions.name: Silenced
conditions.description: Within 15' radius all sound is suppressed. No verbal spells can be cast.

conditions.name: Prone
conditions.description: Lying on the ground. Melee attackers gain +4 to hit; missile attackers suffer −4.

conditions.name: Invisible
conditions.description: Attackers cannot see target — −4 to hit. Target gains +4 to hit on first attack. Visible after attacking.

conditions.name: Berserk
conditions.description: +2 to hit, +1 damage, attacks nearest creature (friend or foe). Cannot retreat.

conditions.name: Hasted
conditions.description: Double attacks per round, double movement. Ages target 1 year.

conditions.name: Slowed
conditions.description: Half attacks per round, half movement, +4 penalty to AC.

conditions.name: Entangled
conditions.description: Cannot move. Attacks at −2; AC penalty of +2.

conditions.name: Diseased
conditions.description: Specific effects depend on disease. Often: ongoing Con/Str loss or eventual death without treatment.

conditions.name: Petrified
conditions.description: Turned to stone. Effectively removed from combat until restored.

conditions.name: Polymorphed
conditions.description: Transformed into another creature. May lose original abilities depending on spell.

conditions.name: Level Drained
conditions.description: Lost one or more levels to energy drain. Track number of levels lost.

conditions.name: Blessed
conditions.description: +1 to attack rolls and morale. Bless duration 6 rounds.

conditions.name: Protection from Evil/Good
conditions.description: −2 AC vs evil/good summoned creatures, +2 saves vs their attacks. Duration 2 rounds/level.

conditions.name: Sanctuary
conditions.description: Opponents must save vs spells or attack someone else. Breaks if subject attacks.

conditions.name: Mirror Image
conditions.description: 1d4 + 1 per 3 levels duplicate images. Each successful hit destroys one image.

conditions.name: Stoneskin
conditions.description: Absorbs 1d4 + 1 per 2 levels physical attacks. Magic still affects normally.

conditions.name: Regenerating
conditions.description: Heals HP each round (rate varies). Often blocked by fire or acid.

conditions.name: Concentrating
conditions.description: Maintaining a spell or effect. Disrupted by damage — must save vs spell or lose concentration.
